description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed neckline that has purple tape detailing on the inseam and slightly distressed look graphic with flock detailing on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print If you think that a bit of chaos is a good thing, then this round neck  t-shirt from mr. men is perfect for you. While the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and dry all day, the slighty distressed look Mr. Messy graphic with the flock print detailing will remind everyone to leave you alone with your mess. A great casual wear, this T-shirt looks best with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.1', Shoulders- "
